tasks.instruction: After reading the FAQ about what to do when a circuit breaker keeps tripping, submit a contact form selecting the topic for an existing issue that persists after a previous visit and explain that the breaker still trips even after trying the FAQ’s suggested steps.

target_names: What should I do if my circuit breaker keeps tripping?

faq_suggested_actions_include: Unplug or turn off devices on the affected circuit
Plug devices back in one at a time
Avoid running multiple heavy-load appliances on the same circuit
expected_values.contact_reason_label: Existing issue persists after previous visit
